cases.name: same canonical hash is idempotent
cases.pass: no new revision and no partial document

cases.name: stale expected hash conflicts
cases.pass: old document and revision remain unchanged

cases.name: duplicate artifact publish is idempotent
cases.evidence: ApplicationDesignerArtifactPublisher.PublishAsync existing-artifact path; existing migration publish preparation test
cases.pass: one artifact and one publish record are retained

cases.name: publish transaction failure does not advance pointer
cases.pass: previous artifact pointer remains and inserted artifact/record roll back

cases.name: group failure restores database state
cases.pass: no partial document/revision/migration and run is Failed with backup SHA, completion time, and failure diagnostics

cases.name: cancelled or timed-out execution is audited
cases.evidence: Cancellation is executable in ApplicationDevelopmentReliabilityTests.Cancelled_save_does_not_persist_a_partial_document; deterministic timeout injection is Blocked
cases.blockedReason: No production delay/fault-injection seam or external provider is available in the permitted test scope for deterministic timeout outcome evidence
cases.retryCondition: Provide an approved real-provider timeout harness or production-owned timeout seam without changing this test-only scope

cases.name: monitoring export is canonical and redacted
cases.pass: all events contain required fields and no secret payload

cases.name: production recovery rehearsal
cases.blockedReason: maintenance window, authorized operator, real providers and rollback evidence are unavailable
